name: claude-code-toolkit
description: Community-curated Claude Code plugins for developer workflows

plugins.name: explain
plugins.description: Deep code explanation with call graph tracing and dependency mapping

plugins.name: test-fix
plugins.description: Run tests, parse failures, and auto-fix in a loop

plugins.name: security-scan
plugins.description: Scan for hardcoded secrets, OWASP Top 10 patterns, and dependency CVEs

plugins.name: deps
plugins.description: Analyze outdated and vulnerable dependencies across package managers

plugins.name: auto-format
plugins.description: Auto-detect and run project formatter on changed files

plugins.name: guard-secrets
plugins.description: Block commits containing API keys, tokens, or passwords

plugins.name: session-log
plugins.description: Log session timestamps and working directory

plugins.name: context-primer
plugins.description: Auto-generate an optimized CLAUDE.md from your codebase

plugins.name: diff-narrator
plugins.description: Generate narrated walkthroughs of diffs and pull requests

plugins.name: commit-guard
plugins.description: Instant type-checking and linting after every edit

plugins.name: dead-code
plugins.description: Find unreachable code, unused exports, and dead dependency subtrees

plugins.name: auto-todo
plugins.description: Auto-collect TODO/FIXME/HACK comments into a centralized list

plugins.name: perf-check
plugins.description: Static analysis for algorithmic complexity and performance issues
